title: Vowels of All Substrings
titleCn: 所有子字符串中的元音

testcases.input: word = "aba" Output: 6 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "a", "ab", "aba", "b", "ba", and "a". - "b" has 0 vowels in it - "a", "ab", "ba", and "a" have 1 vowel each - "aba" has 2 vowels in it Hence, the total sum of vowels = 0 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 2 = 6.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "a", "ab", "aba", "b", "ba", and "a". - "b" has 0 vowels in it - "a", "ab", "ba", and "a" have 1 vowel each - "aba" has 2 vowels in it Hence, the total sum of vowels = 0 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 2 = 6.

testcases.input: word = "abc" Output: 3 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "a", "ab", "abc", "b", "bc", and "c". - "a", "ab", and "abc" have 1 vowel each - "b", "bc", and "c" have 0 vowels each Hence, the total sum of vowels = 1 + 1 + 1 + 0 + 0 + 0 = 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "a", "ab", "abc", "b", "bc", and "c". - "a", "ab", and "abc" have 1 vowel each - "b", "bc", and "c" have 0 vowels each Hence, the total sum of vowels = 1 + 1 + 1 + 0 + 0 + 0 = 3.

testcases.input: word = "ltcd" Output: 0 Explanation: There are no vowels in any substring of "ltcd".
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no vowels in any substring of "ltcd".
